argument: The core of the contested claim remains verifiable: Julaiti Alafate is listed as a Co-Founder & CTO of Skillset according to evidence from a recognized source, the Launch Tracker blog ([launchtracker]). This source specifically names her position alongside her relevant qualifications and background, including a PhD in Computer Science from UC San Diego and experience as a Staff Research Scientist at Meta, which support her capability in a CTO role. However, I concede that this information primarily stems from a self-reporting source without additional independent validation like financial filings, rendering the framing of her position potentially overstated. Notably, this self-reported evidence does offer an outline of her formal association with Skillset, suggesting her founding role but lacking direct confirmation of her day-to-day responsibilities. Thus, while I can confirm her title and association, I acknowledge that the concrete verification of her current active involvement remains weak.
